note: greeting-1.mp3 is a HAND-PICKED SPLICED take (2026-07-12, Kurt-approved delivery). Do NOT re-run `make greetings` casually — a fresh render of the same text will replace this exact delivery with a random new one. Re-render only on a voice_id/settings change, then re-audition.

clips.text: Hey! <break time="0.6s" /> You've reached K P H. <break time="0.7s" /> Kurt's virtual assistant. <break time="0.8s" /> Ah — his Klanker! <break time="0.8s" /> How can I help?
